channel.title: 2026-03-12 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-12 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: SrTi¹⁸O₃ 中同位素效应的机器学习从头开始研究
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Jonathan Schmidt and Nicola A. Spaldin
作者：Jonathan Schmidt 和 Nicola A. Spaldin 我们使用自洽调和近似和机器学习原子间势来计算 ¹⁸O 替代对量子顺电 SrTiO₃ (STO) 性质的影响。我们发现包括量子效应和非谐波效应在内的计算是...... [物理。莱特牧师。 136, 106404] 2026 年 3 月 12 日星期四发布

item.title: Crack initiation and propagation in magnesium-lithium alloys: Revealed by machine learning potential
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Materials
👤 Yincan Sun, Zhigang Ding, Jincheng Kan, Yonghao Zhao, Shuang Li, and Xiang Chen
Author(s): Yincan Sun, Zhigang Ding, Jincheng Kan, Yonghao Zhao, Shuang Li, and Xiang Chen Accurately predicting the crack behavior of magnesium-lithium (Mg-Li) alloys through atomic-scale simulations is essential for understanding crack-defect interactions and designing high-plasticity alloys. However, existing molecular dynamics potentials for Mg-Li alloys are inadequate for reliably mo… [Phys. Rev. Materials 10, 033606] Published Thu Mar 12, 2026

item.title: Cool Qubits Make Faster Decisions
item.description:
📚 Physics
👤 Marric Stephens
Author(s): Marric Stephens Applying thermodynamic principles makes quantum machine-learning protocols more efficient. [Physics 19, s28] Published Thu Mar 12, 2026

item.title: Imaging out-of-plane magnetization via the tip-contact-induced anomalous Nernst effect
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Nico Budai, Hironari Isshiki, and YoshiChika Otani
Author(s): Nico Budai, Hironari Isshiki, and YoshiChika Otani Imaging out-of-plane magnetization is essential for understanding and controlling nanoscale spintronic devices. Here researchers demonstrate a simple magnetic imaging technique based on the anomalous Nernst effect, using a conventional atomic force microscope. By touching the probe tip with a heated nanowire to induce a lateral temperature gradient, multidomain structures of out-of-plane magnetization are visualized with sub-200-nm resolution. This approach provides a practical, robust means of characterizing spin–orbit-torque-driven magnetic structures in nanoscale devices. [Phys. Rev. Applied 25, L031002] Published Thu Mar 12, 2026

item.title: Polar-Displacement Mechanism for Negative Poisson’s Ratio in Ferroelectric Perovskites
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Xue Ma, Jinjing Zhang, Lianhua He, Shuai Yang, Fei Li, and Bin Xu
作者：马雪、张金晶、何连华、杨帅、李飞和徐斌 铁电钙钛矿中的负泊松比源自于应变下原子保持键长的局部极性位移。 [物理。莱特牧师。 136, 106102] 2026 年 3 月 12 日星期四发布
